TITLE
	L2-04 Total Heat Exchanger Test ;

GDAT
	FILE w=tokyo_3column_SI.has ;
	RUN (12/25) 1/1-1/3 ;
	PRINT 1/1-1/3 *wd ;
*

EXSRF
	r=0.2 ;
	south a=0.0 ;
	north a=180.0 ;
	east a=90.0 ;
	west a=270.0 ;
	Hor ;
	earth Z=1.5 ;
*

WALL
	-E:ExtWall RC-150 FPS-50 GPB-12 ;
	-R:Roof FPS-100 GPB-12 ;
	-F:Floor GPB-12 FPS-100 RC-150 ;
*

ROOM
	TestRoom Vol=100.0
		*s
		alc=4.6
		south: -E ExtWall 20.0 ;
		north: -E ExtWall 20.0 ;
		east: -E ExtWall 12.5 ;
		west: -E ExtWall 12.5 ;
		Hor: -R Roof 40.0 ;
		earth: -F Floor 40.0 ;
	*
*

EQPCAT
	FAN testfan Qmax=100.0 ;
	THEX testhex et=0.7 eh=0.6 ;
*

SYSCMP
	SupplyFan -c testfan ;
	ExhaustFan -c testfan ;
	HeatExchanger -c testhex ;
	TestRoom -Nin 1 ;
*

SYSPTH
	SupplyPath -sys A -f A
		> (0.05) _OA HeatExchanger[O] SupplyFan TestRoom > ;
	ExhaustPath -sys B -f A
		> (0.05) TestRoom HeatExchanger[E] ExhaustFan > ;
*

CONTL
	! 経路ON（常時換気運転）
	SupplyPath=ON ;
	ExhaustPath=ON ;
*
*
